codeReviewIssues.description: The test_cosine_similarity_improvement test fails with 'Trying to backward through the graph a second time' error. This is because the same latent tensor is being used in multiple forward passes without re-initialization. While this is a test issue rather than an implementation bug, the test should be fixed to properly demonstrate training improvement.

summary: HyperNetwork implementation is well-structured with comprehensive test coverage. The code follows clean API design with proper separation between generation and encoding paths. The only notable issue is a test failure in test_cosine_similarity_improvement related to PyTorch autograd graph reuse, which is a test-side issue rather than an implementation problem.
